# awsext_lexv2_bot_import (Resource)

Imports an Amazon Lex V2 bot from a zip archive using the LexV2 import API (CreateUploadUrl / StartImport / DescribeImport). Supports idempotent creation via `import_on_exists`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "awsext_lexv2_bot_import" "addservice" {
  zip_file_path = "${path.module}/../_Resource/Connect/Lex/bot.zip"
  zip_sha256    = filesha256("${path.module}/../_Resource/Connect/Lex/bot.zip")
  role_arn      = "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/lex-bot-role"
  merge_strategy = "Overwrite"

  import_resource_specification = jsonencode({
    botImportSpecification = {
      botName                 = "bc-sonic-dev-AIAgent-Bot"
      idleSessionTTLInSeconds = 300
      roleArn                 = "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/lex-bot-role"
      dataPrivacy             = { childDirected = false }
    }
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `import_resource_specification` (String) JSON-encoded ImportResourceSpecification for the StartImport call. Forces replacement.
- `merge_strategy` (String) Determines how conflicts are resolved when the import already exists. Valid values: Overwrite, FailOnConflict, Append. Forces replacement.
- `role_arn` (String) IAM role ARN that Amazon Lex assumes to build and run the bot. Forces replacement.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `import_on_exists` (Boolean, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) When true, if a bot matching the name in import_resource_specification already exists, adopt it into state instead of running the import. Not stored in state.
- `zip_content_base64` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Base64-encoded zip archive containing the bot definition. Exactly one of zip_file_path or zip_content_base64 must be set. Not stored in state.
- `zip_file_path` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Local path to the zip archive containing the bot definition. Exactly one of zip_file_path or zip_content_base64 must be set. Not stored in state.
- `zip_sha256` (String) SHA256 checksum of the zip archive. Stored in state; changing this value triggers replacement.

### Read-Only

- `bot_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the imported bot.
- `bot_id` (String) The service-assigned identifier of the imported bot.
- `import_id` (String) The import job identifier returned by CreateUploadUrl.
- `import_status` (String) The final import status returned by DescribeImport (Completed, Failed, etc.).
